title: SCOUTING PROGRAMS - 211info
text: BOY SCOUTS CASCADE PACIFIC COUNCIL SCOUTING PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides and oversees the Cub Scouts, Scouts BSA, Exploring, Sea Scouts, and Venturing programs. The scouting programs offer recreational and life-skill building activities. 9700 SW Nimbus Avenue Beaverton, OR 97008 Eligibility: Cub Scouts: Grades K-5 Scouts BSA: Ages 11-17 Exploring: Ages 14-20 Sea Scouts and Venturing: Ages 14-20 Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 225-5777 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 225-5777 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Clatsop, Columbia, Hood River, Linn, Marion, Multnomah, Polk, Sherman, Tillamook, Wasco, Washington, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet buses 45, 62 Services: Scouting Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
